channel.title: Governance on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Governance on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Weekly Progress Report — April 8, 2026
item.description: This week: US$761M in Q1 oil revenue, the Wales GTE project director linked to Venezuela corruption, GYEITI civil society standoff, 22,000 street lights installed, and a $604M highway begins.
